extortion.description: ERWAT is a truly indigenous South African company with extensive expertise in all aspects of water and wastewater management. ERWAT’s purpose is to improve the environment and human well-being by providing sustainable water care and resource recovery. Serving the public and private sectors, ERWAT promotes a healthy environment by providing cost-effective wastewater treatment solutions through innovative technologies developed to meet the ever-growing demand for improved quality in wastewater treatment.
